languages.text: "Мне известно, что Инквизиция — опасный враг. Если подкрепление дома Гапрак до сих пор не прибыло... боюсь, нам придется рассчитывать только на свои силы".
"I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."
languages.original_text: "Мне известно, что Инквизиция — опасный враг. Если подкрепление дома Гапрак до сих пор не прибыло... боюсь, нам придется рассчитывать только на свои силы".

traits.locale_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."
"I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."
"I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

languages.text: “我知道审判庭这个敌人不好惹。若是贾帕克家的援军还未抵达……恐怕我们只能靠自己了。”
languages.original_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

traits.locale_text: “我知道审判庭这个敌人不好惹。若是贾帕克家的援军还未抵达……恐怕我们只能靠自己了。”

languages.text: « Tout ce que je sais, c'est que l'Inquisition est un dangereux adversaire. Si les renforts de la maison Gaprak ne sont pas encore arrivés... j'ai bien peur que nous devions nous contenter de nos seules forces. »
languages.original_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

traits.locale_text: « Tout ce que je sais, c'est que l'Inquisition est un dangereux adversaire. Si les renforts de la maison Gaprak ne sont pas encore arrivés... j'ai bien peur que nous devions nous contenter de nos seules forces. »

languages.text: "Engizisyon'un tehlikeli bir düşman olduğunun farkındayım. Gaprak Hanesi takviyeleri henüz ulaşmadıysa... Korkarım yalnızca kendi kuvvetlerimize bel bağlamak zorunda kalacağız."
languages.original_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

traits.locale_text: "Engizisyon'un tehlikeli bir düşman olduğunun farkındayım. Gaprak Hanesi takviyeleri henüz ulaşmadıysa... Korkarım yalnızca kendi kuvvetlerimize bel bağlamak zorunda kalacağız."

languages.text: «Sé que la Inquisición es un enemigo peligroso. Si los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak aún no han llegado... me temo que solo podremos contar con nuestras propias fuerzas».
languages.original_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

traits.locale_text: «Sé que la Inquisición es un enemigo peligroso. Si los refuerzos de la casa Gaprak aún no han llegado... me temo que solo podremos contar con nuestras propias fuerzas».

languages.text: "Ich weiß, dass die Inquisition ein gefährlicher Feind ist. Wenn die Verstärkung von Haus Gaprak noch nicht eingetroffen ist ... fürchte ich, wir müssen uns auf unsere eigenen Leute verlassen."
languages.original_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, dass die Inquisition ein gefährlicher Feind ist. Wenn die Verstärkung von Haus Gaprak noch nicht eingetroffen ist ... fürchte ich, wir müssen uns auf unsere eigenen Leute verlassen."

languages.text: 「私は、宗教裁判所が危険な敵であることを知っています。もしガプラク家の増援がまだ到着していないなら…我々は、我々の軍隊だけで戦うことになるのではないかと恐れます。」
languages.original_text: "I know that the Inquisition is a dangerous enemy. If House Gaprak's reinforcements have not yet arrived... I fear we shall have to rely on our forces alone."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、宗教裁判所が危険な敵であることを知っています。もしガプラク家の増援がまだ到着していないなら…我々は、我々の軍隊だけで戦うことになるのではないかと恐れます。」
